name: bitcoin-tools
title: Bitcoin Tools
description: Generate, convert, and inspect Bitcoin SV keys, addresses, scripts, transactions, and market data.
author: luke_lorenzo

commands.name: copy-address-from-wif
commands.title: Copy Address from WIF
commands.description: Convert a WIF private key to its BSV address and copy it to the clipboard

arguments.name: wif
arguments.description: The WIF private key to convert

commands.name: p2pkh-script-from-address
commands.title: Create P2PKH Script
commands.description: Create a Pay to Public Key Hash locking script from a BSV address

commands.name: address-from-pubkey-hash
commands.title: Create Address from Public Key Hash
commands.description: Create a BSV address from a 20-byte public key hash

commands.name: generate-address
commands.title: Generate BSV Address
commands.description: Generate a random BSV address and use the configured output behavior

commands.name: generate-xpub
commands.title: Generate BIP32 XPUB
commands.description: Generate a random BIP32 extended public key and use the configured output behavior

commands.name: generate-xpriv
commands.title: Generate BIP32 XPRIV
commands.description: Generate a random BIP32 extended private key and use the configured output behavior

commands.name: generate-private-key
commands.title: Generate Private Key (WIF)
commands.description: Generate a random WIF private key and use the configured output behavior

commands.name: decode-transaction
commands.title: Decode Transaction
commands.description: Decode a raw BSV transaction into a readable summary

commands.name: bitcoin-tools
commands.title: BSV Price in Menu Bar
commands.description: See the current BSV price and block height in the menu bar

commands.name: bitcoin-price
commands.title: Bitcoin Price
commands.subtitle: BSV
commands.description: View current Bitcoin SV market and chain data

scripts.format: biome format --write src tests package.json tsconfig.json biome.json
scripts.lint: biome check src tests package.json tsconfig.json biome.json
scripts.lint:fix: biome check --write src tests package.json tsconfig.json biome.json

preferences.name: copy
preferences.description: Determines whether generated non-secret values are copied to the clipboard. WIF and XPRIV values are always copied.
preferences.title: Copy Generated Values
preferences.label: Copy

preferences.name: insert
preferences.description: Determines whether generated non-secret values are inserted into the currently focused app. WIF and XPRIV values are never inserted.
preferences.title: Insert Generated Values
preferences.label: Insert
